lesson_snippet.concept_explanation: The main idea is what the text is mostly about. Details help explain the main idea.
lesson_snippet.visual_model: Main idea circle with supporting detail branches.
lesson_snippet.common_misconception: Choosing an interesting detail instead of the main idea.
lesson_snippet.lesson_summary: Main ideas tell the big message. Details support it.

worked_example.problem: Text: Dogs bark. Dogs run. Dogs like to play.

steps.label: step_3
steps.content: Find what it is mostly about.

hint_ladder.hint_1: What is the text mostly about?
hint_ladder.hint_3: Find details that support the topic.

guided_practice.prompt: Text: Birds fly and sing. What is the text mostly about?
Text: Fish swim. Which is a detail?
